# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 545. Operation & Movement of Vehicles
##### § 545.456 — Vehicle Classification

An owner as defined by Section 502.001 (Definitions) (31) may identify the vehicle to the department as an automated motor vehicle or an automated driving system.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 973 (S.B.2205), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2017.*
